## opencenter cluster update

Update fields in an existing cluster configuration

```
opencenter cluster update [name] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                       help for update
      --kind-disable-default-cni   disable Kind's default CNI so cluster networking is managed by openCenter
      --strict                     fail if the resulting configuration is not valid
```
